title: Novel electron microscopy techniques for defect detection in engineering components
description: Peer-reviewed paper on surface defect identification methods using scanning electron microscopy combined with automated image analysis.
authors: Smith, J., Doe, J., Patel, R.

title: Characterisation of fatigue crack initiation sites in nickel-based superalloys
description: Study examining the microstructural features that act as fatigue crack initiation sites in turbine blade materials using TEM and EBSD.

title: Surface defect dataset v1.0
description: Annotated scanning electron microscopy images of surface defects in engineering steel components, with defect type labels and severity classifications.

title: Defect analyser tool
description: Open-source Python software for automated classification of surface defects from electron microscopy images using machine learning.

title: Standards committee contribution: surface finish specifications for additive manufacturing
description: The team contributed electron microscopy expertise to the development of surface quality specifications for metal additive manufacturing components, now under review by the BSI committee.

title: Industry white paper: best practices for SEM-based fatigue crack analysis
description: A practical guide covering sample preparation, imaging parameters, and data analysis protocols for characterising fatigue cracks using scanning electron microscopy.
authors: Smith, J., Chen, L., Doe, J.
